summary: The state fetcher divergence is rustfmt-only noise in peer selection and follow-up request paths; no fetching behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 161: M	crates/net/network/src/fetch/mod.rs.
The isolated patch adds semicolons to returns/continues and reformats one boolean condition comparing peer timeout and last_response_likely_bad.
No best-peer update, bad-response replacement, RTT comparison, queued request polling, follow-up request scheduling, or peer state transition behavior changed.
